Our Story

A festival named
after purity.

PARV began in Jodhpur with a simple frustration: too much rice on the market was cut, blended, or aged with additives before it ever reached a plate. We wanted to build something else entirely — a brand where the name itself was a promise.

"Parv" means a festival, a sacred occasion worth celebrating. We chose it because every meal made with honest, unadulterated grain deserves exactly that kind of reverence.

Today, PARV has grown from a single warehouse in Jodhpur into an active distribution network reaching Jaipur — with our own packing facility, Anvi Little India, at the heart of everything we ship.

Khet Se Ghar Tak

The Grain's Journey

01 — SOWN
01

Sown

Selected fields across Rajasthan's rice belt, chosen for soil quality and grain character.

02

Milled

Raw paddy is milled with care, preserving natural aroma, length and texture of every grain.

03

Tested

Every batch is graded and quality-checked before it's cleared to carry the PARV name.

04

Packed

Sealed in-house at Anvi Little India, our own factory — never outsourced, never rushed.

05

Delivered

From Jodhpur to Jaipur and onward — to your distributor, your retailer, your home.

◆ ANVI LITTLE INDIA

Our own factory. Our own promise.

Every sack of PARV rice is packed under our own roof at Anvi Little India — not by a contractor, not by a third party. We control the floor, the hygiene, and the final seal.

That's the only way we can stand behind the word on our logo. Purity isn't something we can outsource.

  • ✧

    In-house packing, always

    No third-party packers. Every bag that leaves our facility was sealed by our own team.

  • ✧

    Hygiene-controlled floor

    Enclosed packing environment with regular sanitation and staff protocols.

  • ✧

    Small-batch quality checks

    Batches are checked at intake, mid-process, and before sealing — not just once.

  • ✧

    Built to scale with us

    As PARV grows from Jodhpur to Jaipur and beyond, Anvi Little India grows with it.

What We Grow, We Pack

Our rice, perfected.

Every variety carries the same standard — batch-tested, in-house packed, and true to the grain on the label.

Signature

Premium Basmati

Long, aromatic grains aged for that unmistakable fragrance — our flagship variety and the one that started it all.

Everyday

Steam Rice

Reliable, consistent grain built for daily kitchens and bulk distribution alike.

Traditional

Sella Rice

Parboiled for extra grain strength — a favourite for larger households and caterers.

Coming Soon

More varieties, one promise.

As PARV expands into new FMCG categories, every future product will carry the same standard: our own factory, our own testing, our own name on the line.

Why PARV

Purity isn't a claim.
It's a process.

FSSAI Registered

Every facility and product complies with national food-safety standards.

Lab-Tested Batches

Each lot is checked for moisture, purity and grain length before packing.

Zero-Blending Policy

No mixing of grades or batches — what's on the label is what's in the bag.

Own Packing Floor

Packed in-house at Anvi Little India under controlled, hygienic conditions.

Partner With Us

Bring PARV to your city.

We're scaling from Jodhpur to Jaipur — and beyond. If you distribute or retail rice and FMCG goods, we'd like to talk.
